project.name: babylon
project.description: Babylon is a deterministic geopolitical simulation engine that models the collapse of American hegemony through Marxist-Leninist-Maoist Third Worldist (MLM-TW) theory. It treats class struggle as the output of material conditions evolving on a topological phase space: a NetworkX/XGI graph of social classes, territories, and communities under per-tick transformations driven by formulas drawn from Capital Volumes I/II/III, Emmanuel/Amin unequal exchange, Kahneman-Tversky survival calculus, and Gramscian legitimation theory.

nodes.name: Simulation Tick Pipeline
nodes.summary: The orchestration backbone that advances WorldState by one discrete tick. Runs 23 modular Systems in strict canonical order via SimulationEngine.run_tick(graph, services, context), so each System sees the in-place graph mutations of every prior System. This is where state, math, and orchestration meet.

businessRules: Systems execute in strict canonical order: ImperialRent -> Solidarity -> Consciousness -> Survival -> Struggle -> Contradiction -> Territory -> Metabolism (and 15 others)
Each System mutates the shared graph in-place; later Systems read prior mutations
WorldState is frozen Pydantic; tick boundary uses model_copy(update=...) for new immutable state
WorldState.events is per-tick (NOT cumulative): empty list means 'no events this tick'
to_graph() / from_graph() round-trip is the seam between Pydantic Ledger and NetworkX Topology
crossDomainInteractions: Drives every other simulation domain by invoking their Systems each tick
Publishes 12+ EventTypes via EventBus that observers (narrative AI, metrics, persistence) consume
Reads constants from GameDefines configuration tree

nodes.name: Imperial Rent & Unequal Exchange
nodes.summary: The Marxist heart of the simulation: when core wages exceed the value produced (W_c > V_c), the difference represents Imperial Rent (Phi) extracted from periphery workers via unequal exchange. This domain implements the Fundamental Theorem of MLM-TW, MELT (Monetary Expression of Labor Time), gamma visibility, and Emmanuel/Amin value-transfer formulas.

businessRules: Revolution in core impossible when W_c > V_c (the Fundamental Theorem)
Imperial rent (Phi) flows from periphery to core each tick
MELT (tau) bridges dollar prices and labor hours: tau = GDP / total labor hours
Labor aristocracy classified when wages_received exceeds value_produced for sustained ticks
Six-phase economic tick: subsistence -> extraction -> tribute -> wages -> subsidy -> decision
crossDomainInteractions: Emits wage flows that Solidarity Transmission Domain reads to compute consciousness drift
Drives Class Consciousness Domain via consciousness_drift bifurcation (fascism vs revolution)
Triggers DecompositionSystem when imperial rent collapses and labor aristocracy converts to periphery worker

nodes.name: Survival Calculus & Rupture
nodes.summary: Core decision mechanism for whether agents acquiesce or rebel. Computes P(S|A) = Sigmoid(Wealth - Subsistence) for survival via acquiescence and P(S|R) = Organization / Repression for survival via revolution. Rupture occurs when P(S|R) > P(S|A), with Kahneman-Tversky loss aversion (lambda=2.25) shaping risk-tolerance.

businessRules: P(S|A) = Sigmoid(Wealth - Subsistence): acquiescence increases as wealth exceeds subsistence
P(S|R) = Organization / Repression: revolution success scales with organization strength
Rupture condition: P(S|R) > P(S|A) for sustained period
Loss aversion: losses weighted 2.25x gains (Kahneman-Tversky)
Solidarity multipliers from neighborhood aggregation amplify P(S|R)
crossDomainInteractions: Reads wealth, subsistence, organization, repression set by Imperial Rent Domain and OODA Action Domain
Hands rupture signals to Class Struggle & Agency Domain for UPRISING event resolution
Crossover threshold consumed by EndgameDetector observer

nodes.name: Consciousness & Solidarity Transmission
nodes.summary: Models class consciousness as a ternary simplex (revolutionary / liberal / fascist) propagated across SOLIDARITY edges. Encodes the bifurcation logic: when wages fall, agitation routes to Fascism (+1 ideology) or Revolution (-1 ideology) depending on whether SOLIDARITY edges are present, with a reification buffer attenuating exploitation visibility.

businessRules: Ternary consciousness simplex must sum to 1.0 (revolutionary + liberal + fascist)
Bifurcation routing: agitation deltas split into ideology buckets via SOLIDARITY edge presence
Solidarity transmission propagates consciousness gradient across edges above an activation threshold
Substrate floor on consciousness baseline; weighted blending across community types
Reification buffer attenuates direct visibility of exploitation
crossDomainInteractions: Receives wage/wealth deltas from Imperial Rent Domain to compute agitation pressure
Feeds organization strength downstream to Survival Calculus Domain (boosts P(S|R))
CommunitySystem amplifies SOLIDARITY edges via XGI hypergraph community memberships

nodes.name: Class Struggle & Agency
nodes.summary: The agency layer (George Floyd Dynamic) that converts material conditions and consciousness state into discrete revolutionary or counter-revolutionary events. Resolves EXCESSIVE_FORCE rolls into UPRISING events, applies revolutionary-offensive and fascist-revanchism follow-on logic, and detects power vacuums plus peripheral revolts.

businessRules: EXCESSIVE_FORCE rolls trigger UPRISING events stochastically
Revolutionary-offensive follow-on: cascading uprisings spread along solidarity subgraph
Fascist-revanchism follow-on: backlash repression intensifies with state-apparatus repression heat
Power vacuums detected when state legitimation falls below threshold in territory
Peripheral revolts can trigger imperial-core retraction
crossDomainInteractions: Triggered by Survival Calculus rupture conditions and Consciousness state
Emits events to Carceral Geography Domain that drive heat dynamics
Feeds OODA State Apparatus AI Domain triggering repression escalation

nodes.name: Carceral Geography & Heat Dynamics
nodes.summary: Implements territory-level state attention through heat dynamics, eviction pipelines, and necropolitical mortality. HIGH_PROFILE territories accumulate heat (state attention); LOW_PROFILE territories decay heat. Heat >= 0.8 triggers an eviction pipeline with sink-node routing, spillover, organization suppression, and dispossession events.

businessRules: Heat accumulates per-tick by OperationalProfile (HIGH_PROFILE +, LOW_PROFILE decays)
Heat >= 0.8 triggers eviction pipeline routing displaced agents to sink nodes
Spillover propagates heat to adjacent H3 hex cells
Necropolitical mortality applied via VitalitySystem when subsistence shortfall persists
Control ratio = enforcers / (prisoners + organized labor) drives CRISIS events
crossDomainInteractions: Reads agency events (uprisings) from Class Struggle Domain to bump heat
DispossessionEventSystem emits events that drive Lifecycle & Reproduction cohort downgrade cascades
Heat scores consumed by OODA State Apparatus AI for escalation-ladder scoring

nodes.name: Capital Circulation (Capital Volumes I/II/III)
nodes.summary: Encodes Marx's three Volumes of Capital as 24 dialectic subclasses operating over a World container of contradictions. Volume I: commodity, labor process, production, wage, accumulation, primitive accumulation. Volume II: M-C-M' circulation, consumption, distribution, reproduction, turnover. Volume III: credit, ground rent, surplus distribution, transformation problem, TRPF, imperial.

businessRules: Each Dialectic[A, B] holds two opposing poles with weight invariants summing to 1.0
Sublation rules fire when threshold predicates met, producing successor Dialectic via factory
Circulation Volume II sublates into RealizationCrisisDialectic on realization failure
Reproduction Vol II sublates into DisproportionalityCrisisDialectic when D-I/D-II balance fails
Credit dialectic sublates into FinancialCrisisDialectic when leverage exceeds threshold
Per-dialectic and universal invariants validated each tick
crossDomainInteractions: Provides theoretical scaffolding for Imperial Rent Domain (imperial.py dialectic)
Crisis dialectics emit events into TRPF & Counter-Tendencies Domain
Class struggle dialectic sublates into PartyDialectic at vanguard threshold, feeding Class Struggle Domain

nodes.name: TRPF, Crisis & Counter-Tendencies
nodes.summary: Models the Tendency of the Rate of Profit to Fall (TRPF) and the counter-tendencies that offset it. Tracks rate of profit s/(c+v), organic composition c/v, fictitious capital, financialization index, credit cycles, and the four crisis dialectics (realization, disproportionality, debt spiral, financial) that emerge when counter-tendencies fail.

businessRules: Rate of profit r = s / (c + v); falls as organic composition c/v rises
Counter-tendencies (foreign trade, cheapening of constant capital, etc.) offset TRPF
Time-decaying multiplier on rent pool encodes diminishing-returns dynamics
Credit cycle phase machine: expansion -> overextension -> crisis -> recovery
Financialization index = claims / real output; > threshold triggers crisis
crossDomainInteractions: Reads c, v, s tensors from Imperial Rent Domain (ValueTensor4x3)
Crisis events feed Bifurcation & Phase Transitions Domain for ceiling effects
Wage compression dynamics modulate Survival Calculus subsistence shortfall

nodes.name: Metabolic Rift & Ecology
nodes.summary: Implements ecological limits on capital accumulation via Marx's metabolic rift concept. Computes per-territory Biocapacity Delta = R - (E * eta) where R is regeneration, E is extraction, eta is entropy. Aggregate Overshoot Ratio = Consumption / Biocapacity exceeds 1.0 in ecological overshoot, publishing METABOLIC_RIFT events.

businessRules: Biocapacity Delta dB = R - (E * eta) per territory per tick
Overshoot Ratio O = Consumption / Biocapacity; O > 1 = ecological overshoot
METABOLIC_RIFT event emitted when overshoot crosses threshold
Per-hex biocapacity stock with extraction history and depletion tracking
Terrain classification (water, resource zones) modulates regeneration rate
crossDomainInteractions: Consumes extraction signals from Imperial Rent Domain
Ecological collapse outcome detected by EndgameDetector observer
Feeds Spatial Substrate Domain via per-hex biocapacity stock updates

nodes.name: Bifurcation & Phase Transitions
nodes.summary: Detects qualitative phase transitions in the simulation using percolation theory and Betti-number topology analysis on the solidarity subgraph. Combines per-axis tendency, bridge detection, ceiling effects, legitimation amplifier, and resilience metrics into a BifurcationResult that classifies the system trajectory as fascist convergence vs revolutionary rupture via a weakest-link model.

businessRules: Solidarity subgraph giant-component crossing threshold = phase transition
Material solidarity ceiling computed from wage-gap ratio interpolation
Consciousness-weighted sigmoid transform on collective identity creates breakage cliff
Legitimation crisis amplifier: 1.0 + (1.0 - mean_legitimation) * (scale - 1.0)
Weakest-link classifier across axes (colonial, patriarchal, etc.) predicts fascism vs revolution
crossDomainInteractions: Observes solidarity edges produced by Consciousness & Solidarity Domain
Reads legitimation index from Lifecycle & Reproduction Domain
BifurcationTendencyEvent triggers state-apparatus AI fascist-convergence override

nodes.name: State Apparatus AI & OODA
nodes.summary: OODA-loop AI controlling the state apparatus and player/NPC organizations. State AI scores candidate actions across three faction objectives (finance capital, security state, settler populist) weighted by current FactionBalance and territory heat. Resolves verb categories (Legislate, Repress, Co-opt, Administer, Territory, Escalate) with stochastic effects and observability tracking.

businessRules: OODA loop per-tick: Observe (build G_observed) -> Orient -> Decide -> Act -> propagate effects
Decision scoring: candidate actions vs three faction objectives weighted by FactionBalance
Faction balance shifts on player-action / repression-failure / material-condition deltas
Repression escalation ladder: infiltrate -> raid -> prosecute -> liquidate, gated by heat & ladder rank
Co-opt vs administer vs repress chosen based on heat, legitimacy, and faction objective weighting
Initiative score determines action ordering each tick
crossDomainInteractions: Reads heat from Carceral Geography Domain to bias escalation
Action effects propagate to Class Consciousness (propagandize, divide) and Class Struggle Domains
Counter-intel against State AI's recent action log enables player intelligence gathering

nodes.name: Contradiction Field Dynamics
nodes.summary: Field-theoretic layer that computes named field values per node from the formula registry, tracks per-edge tension, identifies the principal contradiction by gradient magnitude, and runs declarative ContradictionFrames. EdgeTransitionSystem moves relationships between EdgeMode states (e.g. exploitation -> co-optive -> rupture) using compound predicate conditions.

businessRules: Contradiction intensity = sigmoid(ideological_divergence * dual_centrality), clamped [0, 1]
Principal contradiction identified per-tick by maximum gradient magnitude
Edges transition states via compound predicates over field values and derivatives
Sliding-window history of field values used for derivative computation
CONTRADICTION_INTENSIFIED, RUPTURE, and qualitative-leap events published to event bus
crossDomainInteractions: Reads ideology from Consciousness Domain and centrality from graph topology
Drives Class Struggle agency events through RUPTURE event publication
Field derivatives feed Bifurcation & Phase Transitions Domain

nodes.name: Lifecycle, Reproduction & Mobility
nodes.summary: Demographic and political lifecycle dynamics: cohort transitions (D->P->D' dispossession circuit), legitimation index calculation, intergenerational wealth transfer via Pareto-Gini inheritance, class mobility (promotion/demotion probabilities), and shadow-subsidy of unwaged labor through dual-circuit modeling. Composed from four pluggable calculator dependencies.

businessRules: Cohort flow D->P->D': dispossessed -> proletarianized -> displaced
Legitimation index in [0, 1] computed per-territory; drives bifurcation routing
Inheritance via Pareto-Gini distribution reproduces class structure across cohorts
Class mobility transitions parameterized by ClassMobilityParams per cohort
Dual circuit: shadow-labor subsidy from informal to formal economic circuits
Vitality mortality scales with inequality and wealth-to-subsistence shortfall
crossDomainInteractions: Receives DISPOSSESSION events from Carceral Geography Domain
Legitimation index consumed by Bifurcation Domain (legitimation amplifier)
Mortality rates feed VitalitySystem in Tick Pipeline

nodes.name: Narrative AI & Archive (Persephone)
nodes.summary: The third pillar of the Embedded Trinity: a read-only narrative observer that watches state changes and generates dual-perspective narrative log entries via an LLM. NarrativeDirector translates simulation events into RAG queries against the ChromaDB Archive (Marxist corpus), then produces narrative through the Persephone persona. The Archive observes; it never writes back to the Ledger.

businessRules: AI observes state changes; never controls mechanics (one-way coupling)
Each tick event maps to a RAG query against the Marxist corpus in ChromaDB
Persona renders into a system prompt for the LLM (DeepSeek or MockLLM)
NarrativeCommissar judges narrative outputs along ominousness, certainty, drama, metaphor-family
Context window manager honors token budgets and reserve allocations
Narrative frames validated against JSON Schema Draft 2020-12
crossDomainInteractions: Subscribes as SimulationObserver to all 12+ EventTypes from the Tick Pipeline
CausalChainObserver feeds shock-doctrine causal frames into narrative pipeline
Reads Marxist theory corpus from ChromaDB persisted via embeddings layer

nodes.name: Spatial Substrate (H3 Hex Grid)
nodes.summary: The geospatial backbone: a Resolution-8 H3 hex grid generated via Uber's H3 library, snapped to Natural Earth polygons (lakes, roads, railroads, airports, ports). Each hex carries terrain classification, biocapacity stock, infrastructure links/junctions/vertices, and FCC broadband internet coverage. End-to-end r8 pipeline produces the spatial substrate that all territory-aware systems read.

businessRules: H3 resolution-8 hex grid is the canonical spatial unit
Natural Earth shapefiles snapped onto R8 hexes via shapely intersection + haversine vertex matching
Per-hex biocapacity, terrain, utility coverage, linear features validated by Pydantic
Nonlocal edges (airport routes, shipping lanes) connect distant H3 cells with capacity weights
FCC broadband data drives internet access modeling per hex
Parent-child resolution consistency validated for H3 indices
crossDomainInteractions: Provides Territory entities consumed by Carceral Geography and Lifecycle Domains
Biocapacity stocks read by Metabolic Rift Domain for ecological accounting
Infrastructure capacity edges power Capital Circulation throughput calculations

nodes.name: Run Canonical Tick
nodes.summary: Drive WorldState forward one tick by walking the canonical 23-System pipeline (ImperialRent -> Solidarity -> Consciousness -> Survival -> Struggle -> Contradiction -> Territory -> Metabolism + 15 others) in strict order.

nodes.name: Dispatch Events via EventBus
nodes.summary: Publish events through the pub/sub EventBus interceptor chain to fan out to subscribers (observers, narrative AI, persistence).

nodes.name: Hydrate From Reference Data
nodes.summary: Load reference data (counties, hex claims, class shares, profit rates, reserve army, territories, industries) from the SQLite reference DB into initial simulation state.

nodes.name: Extract Imperial Rent (Phi)
nodes.summary: Run the six-phase economic tick (subsistence -> extraction -> tribute -> wages -> subsidy -> decision) implementing the Fundamental Theorem of MLM-TW: rent flows from periphery to core when W_c > V_c.

nodes.name: Compute MELT (tau)
nodes.summary: Compute Monetary Expression of Labor Time tau = GDP / total labor hours, bridging dollar prices and Marxian labor values for downstream class-position classification.

nodes.name: Transfer Value via Unequal Exchange
nodes.summary: Apply Emmanuel/Amin unequal exchange formulas to compute exchange ratio between core/periphery labor, exploitation rate, value transfer per production unit, and Prebisch-Singer terms-of-trade decline.

nodes.name: Decompose Labor Aristocracy
nodes.summary: When imperial rent collapses, convert labor-aristocracy entities toward periphery-worker status and reweight enforcer/comprador populations accordingly.

nodes.name: Compute Survival Probabilities
nodes.summary: Compute per-node P(S|A) = Sigmoid(Wealth - Subsistence) for survival via acquiescence and P(S|R) = Organization / Repression for survival via revolution, with Kahneman-Tversky loss aversion applied.

nodes.name: Detect Rupture Crossover
nodes.summary: Compare P(S|R) vs P(S|A) per agent to detect the rupture condition (revolutionary survival probability now exceeds acquiescence probability).

nodes.name: Propagate Solidarity Transmission
nodes.summary: Walk SOLIDARITY edges to propagate class consciousness via calculate_solidarity_transmission, updating per-node ideology profiles and publishing CONSCIOUSNESS_DRIFT events.

nodes.name: Bifurcate Consciousness Routing
nodes.summary: Apply bifurcation logic: when wages fall, route agitation deltas via solidarity edge presence into ternary ideology buckets (revolutionary / liberal / fascist), attenuated by reification buffer.

nodes.name: Amplify via Community Hyperedges
nodes.summary: Build XGI hypergraph of community memberships, aggregate ternary consciousness across communities, and amplify SOLIDARITY edges through community-overlap scoring.

nodes.name: Resolve UPRISING Event (George Floyd Dynamic)
nodes.summary: Roll EXCESSIVE_FORCE events with seeded RNG; on success trigger UPRISING events that publish to the event bus and seed downstream offensive/revanchism logic.

nodes.name: Cascade Revolutionary Offensive
nodes.summary: Walk the solidarity subgraph from each uprising node to cascade follow-on uprising effects; apply opposing fascist-revanchism backlash where state-apparatus repression heat dominates.

nodes.name: Detect Power Vacuum
nodes.summary: Read territory legitimation indices and emit POWER_VACUUM events when legitimation falls below threshold, signaling that state authority has effectively withdrawn.

nodes.name: Apply Territory Heat Dynamics
nodes.summary: For each territory, accumulate or decay heat based on OperationalProfile (HIGH_PROFILE +, LOW_PROFILE decays), propagate heat spillover to adjacent hexes, and apply necropolitical mortality.

nodes.name: Run Eviction Pipeline
nodes.summary: When heat >= 0.8, route displaced agents to sink-node territories, propagate spillover to adjacent hexes, and emit EVICTION events that feed lifecycle dispossession cascades.

nodes.name: Emit Dispossession Events
nodes.summary: Compute per-territory dispossession intensity and value-transfer magnitudes via DispossessionIntensityCalculator, publishing DISPOSSESSION events for downstream observers and the ledger.

nodes.name: Track Control Ratio
nodes.summary: Track ratio of state enforcers to controlled population (prisoners + organized labor), emitting CRISIS and TERMINAL_DECISION events when ratios cross thresholds defined by the state-apparatus AI.

nodes.name: Advance Capital Volume I Dialectics
nodes.summary: Step the Vol I dialectics (commodity, labor process, production, wage, accumulation, primitive accumulation), enforcing law-of-value invariants on each.

nodes.name: Advance Capital Volume II (Circulation & Reproduction)
nodes.summary: Step the Vol II dialectics (M-C-M' circulation, consumption, distribution, reproduction, turnover); sublate to RealizationCrisis or DisproportionalityCrisis when invariants fail.

nodes.name: Advance Capital Volume III (Credit, Rent, TRPF)
nodes.summary: Step the Vol III dialectics (credit, rent, surplus distribution, transformation problem, TRPF, imperial); sublate to FinancialCrisis or DebtSpiralCrisis on threshold breach.

nodes.name: Apply Sublation Rules
nodes.summary: Per-tick, evaluate each Dialectic's SublationRule threshold predicates; on fire, invoke the successor-Dialectic factory and replace the original in the World container.

nodes.name: Compute Rate of Profit Trajectory
nodes.summary: Compute rate of profit r = s / (c + v) and organic composition c / v, then apply counter-tendency multipliers to determine net TRPF trajectory each tick.

nodes.name: Detect Credit Cycle Phase
nodes.summary: Read FRED federal-funds and credit-aggregate data, classify the credit cycle phase (expansion / overextension / crisis / recovery) per Marx's Volume III credit theory, and emit phase-transition events.

nodes.name: Assess Financial Crisis
nodes.summary: Compute Marx's fictitious capital stocks (government debt, equity market cap, derivatives notional), derive financialization index = claims / real output, and emit FinancialCrisisDialectic when threshold breached.

nodes.name: Compute Biocapacity Delta
nodes.summary: For each territory, compute Biocapacity Delta dB = R - (E * eta) where R = regeneration, E = extraction, eta = entropy. Write delta to the per-hex biocapacity stock.

nodes.name: Detect Ecological Overshoot
nodes.summary: Compute aggregate Overshoot Ratio O = Consumption / Biocapacity; when O > 1 and crosses threshold, publish METABOLIC_RIFT event and contribute to ecological-collapse endgame condition.

nodes.name: Run Bifurcation Analysis
nodes.summary: Combine per-axis tendency, bridge detection, ceiling effects, legitimation amplifier, and Betti/resilience metrics into a BifurcationResult; classify trajectory as fascist convergence vs revolutionary rupture via weakest-link model.

nodes.name: Detect Percolation Phase Transition
nodes.summary: Extract solidarity subgraph, compute giant-component metrics; when the giant component crosses critical percolation threshold, a qualitative phase change has occurred.

nodes.name: Detect Endgame Outcome
nodes.summary: Three terminal-outcome detectors: revolutionary victory (solidarity percolation + class consciousness threshold), ecological collapse (overshoot + biocapacity), fascist consolidation (national identity + repression).

nodes.name: Execute OODA Cycle
nodes.summary: Walk the OODA loop for organizations: scan organization nodes (Layer 0), build observed subgraph via attention threads (Observe), compute initiative scores, apply action budget, resolve actions, propagate effects (Layer 3).

nodes.name: Decide State Action
nodes.summary: RuleBasedStateAI scores candidate actions against three faction objectives (finance capital, security state, settler populist) weighted by FactionBalance and modulated by territory heat; selects the highest-scoring action.

nodes.name: Resolve Repression Verb
nodes.summary: Resolve Repress-verb State AI sub-actions (infiltrate / raid / prosecute / liquidate), each gated by escalation-ladder constraints and territorial conditions; create observable-action records with heat-modulated visibility.

nodes.name: Shift Faction Balance
nodes.summary: Apply FactionBalance shift dynamics from player-action / repression-failure / material-condition deltas; renormalize and check for fascist override behavior at convergence threshold.

nodes.name: Update Contradiction Tension
nodes.summary: Per-edge, compute calculate_contradiction_intensity from ideological divergence and dual centrality; sigmoid-clamped to [0, 1] and emitted as CONTRADICTION_INTENSIFIED events.

nodes.name: Identify Principal Contradiction
nodes.summary: Compute per-node temporal and spatial derivatives over registered fields; identify the principal contradiction by maximum gradient magnitude for downstream predicate evaluation.

nodes.name: Transition Edge Modes
nodes.summary: Apply declarative state machine moving relationship edges between EdgeMode states (e.g. exploitation -> co-optive -> rupture) using compound predicate conditions over field values and derivatives.

nodes.name: Advance Cohort Lifecycle
nodes.summary: Cohort-based DPD (dual-process dispossession) lifecycle calculator tracking promotion, demotion, and reproduction flows across class cohorts each tick.

nodes.name: Compute Legitimation Index
nodes.summary: Compute the [0, 1] state-legitimacy score per territory; classify legitimation crisis levels and feed the bifurcation legitimation amplifier.

nodes.name: Apply Class Mobility
nodes.summary: Compute inter-class promotion/demotion probabilities per cohort using ClassMobilityParams; apply transitions to update population counts in each class.

nodes.name: Apply Mortality
nodes.summary: Compute per-class mortality rate scaled by inequality and the wealth-to-subsistence shortfall, clamped to [0, 1]; emit DEATHS events to metrics and persistence observers.

nodes.name: Generate Tick Narrative
nodes.summary: NarrativeDirector subscribes to tick events, translates each event to a RAG query, renders the Persephone persona prompt, invokes the LLM, and judges the narrative output for ominousness/certainty/drama.

nodes.name: Retrieve Marxist Corpus (RAG)
nodes.summary: End-to-end retrieval pipeline: embed query via Ollama, search ChromaDB vectors, assemble bounded context window honoring token budgets and reserve allocations, return QueryResponse to the narrative director.

nodes.name: Detect Shock Doctrine Pattern
nodes.summary: CausalChainObserver maintains a sliding-window TickSnapshot history and detects shock-doctrine patterns (wage crash followed by repression spike), emitting structured causal frames for narrative generation.

nodes.name: Build R8 Substrate
nodes.summary: End-to-end pipeline that builds the r8 substrate (mesh + classification + aggregation + edges) from Natural Earth and FCC sources for the simulation's geospatial backbone.

nodes.name: Snap Natural Earth Features
nodes.summary: Snap Natural Earth shapefiles (lakes, roads, railroads, airports, ports) onto the R8 H3 hex mesh using shapely intersection and haversine vertex matching, creating InfrastructureLinkState and JunctionState entities.

nodes.name: Generate Nonlocal Edges
nodes.summary: Generate nonlocal infrastructure edges (airport routes, shipping lanes) connecting distant H3 cells with capacity weights, enabling cross-territory throughput in the topology graph.

nodes.name: Bootstrap ServiceContainer
nodes.summary: Construct ServiceContainer with GameDefines, SimulationConfig, EventBus, FormulaRegistry, and DatabaseConnection.

nodes.name: WorldState.to_graph()
nodes.summary: Serialize WorldState (Pydantic) into NetworkX DiGraph that Systems mutate in place.

nodes.name: Invoke ImperialRentSystem
nodes.summary: Run the first system in the pipeline: six-phase economic tick computing Phi flows.

nodes.name: Invoke SolidaritySystem
nodes.summary: Propagate consciousness across SOLIDARITY edges following ImperialRent's wage updates.

nodes.name: Invoke ConsciousnessSystem
nodes.summary: Apply bifurcation logic routing agitation deltas into ternary ideology buckets.

nodes.name: Invoke SurvivalSystem
nodes.summary: Compute P(S|A) and P(S|R) per node, the central rupture-condition formula.

nodes.name: Invoke remaining canonical systems
nodes.summary: Run StruggleSystem, ContradictionSystem, TerritorySystem, MetabolismSystem, and remaining 15 systems in canonical order.

nodes.name: WorldState.from_graph()
nodes.summary: Deserialize the mutated NetworkX DiGraph back into a frozen WorldState Pydantic instance.

nodes.name: Emit per-tick events
nodes.summary: Collect this tick's events into the new WorldState (per-tick, NOT cumulative).

nodes.name: Notify SimulationObservers
nodes.summary: Fan out to attached SimulationObserver instances (SessionRecorder, EndgameDetector, Metrics, Persistence, etc.).

nodes.name: Assemble event payload
nodes.summary: Construct typed Event with EventType, payload, and tick metadata.

nodes.name: Run interceptor chain
nodes.summary: Pass event through the ordered interceptor chain that may transform or veto.

nodes.name: Fan out to subscribers
nodes.summary: Deliver final event to all registered subscribers for that EventType.

nodes.name: Open SQLite reference DB
nodes.summary: Open marxist-data-3NF.sqlite via SQLAlchemy 2.0 declarative session.

nodes.name: Load counties + hex claims
nodes.summary: Read county FIPS codes and their H3 hex-cell claims into Territory entities.

nodes.name: Load class shares
nodes.summary: Load FRED DFA-derived class shares for proletariat, petit-bourgeoisie, bourgeoisie, labor aristocracy.

nodes.name: Load territories + industry hyperedges
nodes.summary: Load Territory entities and the XGI hypergraph of industry memberships.

nodes.name: Emit initial WorldState
nodes.summary: Construct the frozen Pydantic WorldState that the engine consumes for tick 0.

nodes.name: Read wages and value produced
nodes.summary: Per node, read W_c (core wages) and V_c (value produced) from the graph.

nodes.name: Compute labor aristocracy ratio
nodes.summary: Compute LAR = W_c / V_c; classify as labor aristocracy when LAR > 1.

nodes.name: Run six-phase economic tick
nodes.summary: Execute subsistence -> extraction -> tribute -> wages -> subsidy -> decision in order.

nodes.name: Apply extraction to periphery
nodes.summary: Debit periphery wealth equal to imperial rent (Phi) extracted by core in this tick.

nodes.name: Credit tribute to core
nodes.summary: Credit core entities with the Phi tribute flowing in from periphery.

nodes.name: Emit rent flow on graph
nodes.summary: Update WAGES and TRIBUTE edges with the per-tick Phi flow magnitudes.

nodes.name: Fetch BEA GDP series
nodes.summary: Pull annual GDP from the BEA data source via the protocol-driven adapter.

nodes.name: Fetch QCEW labor hours
nodes.summary: Pull total annual labor hours from the QCEW data source.

nodes.name: Divide tau = GDP / labor hours
nodes.summary: Compute tau (MELT) and emit; downstream calculators convert dollars <-> labor time using this scalar.

nodes.name: Compute exchange ratio
nodes.summary: Compute exchange ratio between core and periphery labor per Emmanuel/Amin.

nodes.name: Apply Prebisch-Singer decline
nodes.summary: Apply terms-of-trade decline factor to periphery commodity exports.

nodes.name: Write value transfer flow
nodes.summary: Update graph edges with the per-tick value transfer magnitude from periphery to core.

nodes.name: Detect imperial rent collapse
nodes.summary: Check if Phi has fallen below the configured collapse threshold this tick.

nodes.name: Reduce aristocracy population
nodes.summary: Convert a fraction of labor-aristocracy population back to periphery-worker status.

nodes.name: Reweight enforcer pool
nodes.summary: Update enforcer/comprador population counts to reflect the shifted class structure.

nodes.name: Read wealth and subsistence
nodes.summary: Per node, read wealth and the subsistence floor from SurvivalProfile.

nodes.name: Apply Sigmoid for P(S|A)
nodes.summary: Compute P(S|A) = Sigmoid(Wealth - Subsistence).

nodes.name: Read organization and repression
nodes.summary: Per node, read Organization strength and Repression intensity from neighborhood aggregation.

nodes.name: Divide for P(S|R)
nodes.summary: Compute P(S|R) = Organization / Repression scaled by aggregated solidarity multipliers.

nodes.name: Apply loss aversion
nodes.summary: Apply Kahneman-Tversky lambda = 2.25 loss aversion to risk-tolerance for both probabilities.

nodes.name: Compare P(S|R) vs P(S|A)
nodes.summary: Per node, check whether P(S|R) > P(S|A).

nodes.name: Check crossover threshold
nodes.summary: Apply the crossover threshold and persistence requirement before flagging.

nodes.name: Flag rupture condition
nodes.summary: Mark the node with rupture flag in the graph; downstream Struggle System reads.

nodes.name: Enumerate SOLIDARITY edges
nodes.summary: List all SOLIDARITY edges in the graph as the transmission backbone.

nodes.name: Compute consciousness gradient
nodes.summary: For each edge, compute the consciousness delta between source and target ideology profiles.

nodes.name: Apply activation threshold
nodes.summary: Filter edges where edge solidarity strength exceeds the activation threshold.

nodes.name: Update ideology profiles
nodes.summary: Write new ideology profile values back to graph nodes.

nodes.name: Emit CONSCIOUSNESS_DRIFT event
nodes.summary: Publish CONSCIOUSNESS_DRIFT event with magnitude and node ID for observers.

nodes.name: Read wage deltas
nodes.summary: Per node, read wage and wealth deltas from prior ImperialRent step.

nodes.name: Compute agitation energy
nodes.summary: Convert wage deltas into agitation energy magnitude.

nodes.name: Check SOLIDARITY edge presence
nodes.summary: Determine bifurcation direction by whether the node has incoming SOLIDARITY edges.

nodes.name: Route into ternary simplex
nodes.summary: Distribute agitation energy across (revolutionary, liberal, fascist) buckets summing to 1.0.

nodes.name: Attenuate via reification buffer
nodes.summary: Apply reification-buffer attenuation to dampen direct exploitation visibility.

nodes.name: Build XGI hypergraph
nodes.summary: Construct the hypergraph of community memberships from graph data.

nodes.name: Aggregate ternary consciousness
nodes.summary: Aggregate ternary consciousness across community members using community-type weights.

nodes.name: Apply solidarity amplification
nodes.summary: Boost SOLIDARITY edge strengths between members sharing a community.

nodes.name: Roll EXCESSIVE_FORCE
nodes.summary: Per heat-eligible territory, roll EXCESSIVE_FORCE event with seeded RNG.

nodes.name: Trigger uprising
nodes.summary: On EXCESSIVE_FORCE success, mark territory and adjacent solidarity neighbors with uprising flag.

nodes.name: Emit UPRISING event
nodes.summary: Publish UPRISING event with territory ID, magnitude, and seed for downstream cascade.

nodes.name: Traverse solidarity subgraph
nodes.summary: BFS traversal from each uprising node along SOLIDARITY edges within reach.

nodes.name: Apply revolutionary offensive
nodes.summary: Boost organization and revolutionary consciousness for nodes touched by cascade.

nodes.name: Apply fascist revanchism
nodes.summary: Apply opposite-direction backlash where state repression heat dominates.

nodes.name: Read territory legitimation
nodes.summary: Read legitimation index for each territory from prior LifecycleSystem step.

nodes.name: Check vacuum threshold
nodes.summary: Determine territories where legitimation falls below configured threshold.

nodes.name: Emit POWER_VACUUM event
nodes.summary: Publish POWER_VACUUM event for state-apparatus AI and narrative subsystems.

nodes.name: Read OperationalProfile
nodes.summary: Per territory, read OperationalProfile (HIGH_PROFILE, LOW_PROFILE, etc.).

nodes.name: Accumulate or decay heat
nodes.summary: Apply per-tick heat accumulation or decay based on profile.

nodes.name: Propagate heat spillover
nodes.summary: Diffuse a fraction of heat to ADJACENCY-edge neighbors.

nodes.name: Apply necropolitical mortality
nodes.summary: When subsistence shortfall persists, apply additional mortality via VitalitySystem hand-off.

nodes.name: Suppress organizations
nodes.summary: Apply suppression to organizations operating in high-heat territories.

nodes.name: Check heat >= 0.8 threshold
nodes.summary: Filter territories whose heat has crossed the eviction threshold.

nodes.name: Route to sink node
nodes.summary: Route displaced agents to designated sink-node territories.

nodes.name: Emit EVICTION event
nodes.summary: Publish EVICTION event with source/sink IDs and population magnitude.

nodes.name: Compute dispossession intensity
nodes.summary: Compute per-territory dispossession intensity via DispossessionIntensityCalculator.

nodes.name: Compute value transfer
nodes.summary: Compute the value-transfer magnitude flowing from dispossessed to absentee landlords.

nodes.name: Publish DISPOSSESSION event
nodes.summary: Publish DISPOSSESSION event for downstream LifecycleSystem and observers.

nodes.name: Count state enforcers
nodes.summary: Sum enforcer population across state-aligned organizations.

nodes.name: Count controlled population
nodes.summary: Sum prisoners and organized labor as the controlled denominator.

nodes.name: Emit CRISIS event if unbalanced
nodes.summary: If the ratio crosses configured threshold, emit CRISIS or TERMINAL_DECISION event.

nodes.name: Advance commodity dialectic
nodes.summary: Step the use-value vs exchange-value contradiction; enforce the law of value.

nodes.name: Advance labor process dialectic
nodes.summary: Step concrete labor vs abstract labor (socially necessary labor time).

nodes.name: Advance production dialectic
nodes.summary: Step production process over DepartmentRow tensors with c-v-s invariants.

nodes.name: Advance wage form dialectic
nodes.summary: Step value of labor power vs price of labor power (nominal/real/relative wage).

nodes.name: Advance accumulation dialectic
nodes.summary: Step centralization of capital vs reserve army expansion.

nodes.name: Advance M-C-M' circuit
nodes.summary: Step the circulation circuit advancing turnover state.

nodes.name: Advance turnover dialectic
nodes.summary: Compute annual surplus value from circulation turnover speed.

nodes.name: Advance reproduction schema
nodes.summary: Step Department-I/Department-II simple-reproduction balance.

nodes.name: Check realization failure
nodes.summary: Sublate to RealizationCrisisDialectic when realization fails.

nodes.name: Check disproportionality
nodes.summary: Sublate to DisproportionalityCrisisDialectic when D-I/D-II balance fails.

nodes.name: Advance credit dialectic
nodes.summary: Step real capital vs fictitious capital, computing financialization index.

nodes.name: Advance rent dialectic
nodes.summary: Step ground/resource/urban rent as deduction from surplus.

nodes.name: Apply transformation problem
nodes.summary: Convert sectoral surplus values into prices of production via average profit rate.

nodes.name: Distribute surplus value
nodes.summary: Split aggregate surplus into interest, ground rent, taxes, profit-of-enterprise.

nodes.name: Advance imperial dialectic
nodes.summary: Step the core/periphery imperial contradiction with LAR computation.

nodes.name: Evaluate threshold predicate
nodes.summary: Per Dialectic, evaluate its declarative SublationRule's threshold predicate.

nodes.name: Invoke successor factory
nodes.summary: On predicate fire, call the rule's successor-Dialectic factory callback.

nodes.name: Replace Dialectic in World
nodes.summary: Swap the original Dialectic for the successor in the World container.

nodes.name: Compute rate of profit r = s/(c+v)
nodes.summary: Compute rate of profit using standard Marxian formula.

nodes.name: Compute organic composition c/v
nodes.summary: Compute organic composition of capital.

nodes.name: Apply counter-tendencies
nodes.summary: Apply CounterTendencyCalculator to offset TRPF.

nodes.name: Fetch FRED interest rates
nodes.summary: Pull federal funds rate and credit aggregates from FRED API.

nodes.name: Classify cycle phase
nodes.summary: Classify expansion / overextension / crisis / recovery from interest-rate state.

nodes.name: Emit phase transition
nodes.summary: Publish CREDIT_CYCLE_PHASE_TRANSITION event when phase changes.

nodes.name: Compute fictitious capital stocks
nodes.summary: Compute government debt, equity market cap, and derivatives notional.

nodes.name: Compute financialization index
nodes.summary: Compute claims/real-output ratio.

nodes.name: Emit FinancialCrisisDialectic
nodes.summary: Sublate the credit dialectic to FinancialCrisisDialectic when threshold breached.

nodes.name: Read territory regeneration
nodes.summary: Read R (regeneration rate) per territory from BiocapacityStock.

nodes.name: Read extraction with entropy
nodes.summary: Read E (extraction) and apply eta entropy multiplier from prior tick.

nodes.name: Write delta to stock
nodes.summary: Update per-hex BiocapacityStock with the dB = R - (E * eta) delta.

nodes.name: Compute overshoot ratio O = C/B
nodes.summary: Compute aggregate Consumption / Biocapacity ratio.

nodes.name: Check overshoot threshold
nodes.summary: Check whether O > 1 and crosses configured threshold.

nodes.name: Emit METABOLIC_RIFT event
nodes.summary: Publish METABOLIC_RIFT event with magnitude and contributor breakdown.

nodes.name: Compute axis tendencies
nodes.summary: Per contradiction axis (colonial, patriarchal, etc.), classify solidarity and antagonism.

nodes.name: Detect cross-line bridges
nodes.summary: Detect INSTITUTIONAL_EXCLUSION hyperedge communities spanning contradiction axes.

nodes.name: Apply legitimation amplifier
nodes.summary: Compute 1.0 + (1.0 - mean_legitimation) * (scale - 1.0) over territory legitimation.

nodes.name: Compute Betti resilience
nodes.summary: Compute Betti numbers, articulation points, minimum edge cuts on solidarity subgraph.

nodes.name: Apply weakest-link classifier
nodes.summary: Apply weakest-link model across axes to classify trajectory.

nodes.name: Emit BifurcationTendencyEvent
nodes.summary: Publish BifurcationTendencyEvent (FASCIST_CONVERGENCE or REVOLUTIONARY_RUPTURE).

nodes.name: Extract solidarity subgraph
nodes.summary: Extract subgraph containing only SOLIDARITY edges.

nodes.name: Compute giant component
nodes.summary: Compute giant connected component size and clustering metrics.

nodes.name: Check percolation threshold
nodes.summary: Determine whether the giant component crosses critical percolation threshold.

nodes.name: Check revolutionary victory
nodes.summary: Detect solidarity percolation + class consciousness threshold for revolutionary victory.

nodes.name: Check ecological collapse
nodes.summary: Detect overshoot + biocapacity-floor breach for ecological-collapse outcome.

nodes.name: Check fascist consolidation
nodes.summary: Detect national-identity + repression-saturation for fascist-consolidation outcome.

nodes.name: Layer 0: scan organizations
nodes.summary: Pre-scan world graph for organization nodes; seed tick-local action results.

nodes.name: Observe via attention threads
nodes.summary: Build G_observed subgraph via attention thread coverage with method-based distortions.

nodes.name: Compute initiative scores
nodes.summary: Compute initiative scores combining cycle-time, institutional bonuses, momentum.

nodes.name: Apply action budget
nodes.summary: Enforce per-tick action-point budgets, coordination range, autonomy modifiers.

nodes.name: Resolve actions
nodes.summary: Resolve action ordering and dispatch to per-action handlers (aid, mobilize, negotiate, etc.).

nodes.name: Layer 3: propagate effects
nodes.summary: Propagate action results back to world graph as heat changes, edge transitions, infrastructure damage.

nodes.name: Read FactionBalance
nodes.summary: Read current FactionBalance (finance / security / settler-populist weights).

nodes.name: Enumerate candidate actions
nodes.summary: List all eligible verb-actions for the state apparatus this tick.

nodes.name: Score vs faction objectives
nodes.summary: Score each candidate action against the three faction objectives weighted by FactionBalance.

nodes.name: Apply heat modulation
nodes.summary: Modulate scores by territory heat to prefer proportionate responses.

nodes.name: Select highest-scoring action
nodes.summary: Select the action with the maximum modulated score for execution.

nodes.name: Check escalation ladder
nodes.summary: Verify the chosen sub-verb does not exceed current escalation rank.

nodes.name: Run infiltrate resolver
nodes.summary: Execute infiltrate sub-verb effects.

nodes.name: Run raid resolver
nodes.summary: Execute raid sub-verb effects with key-figure capture.

nodes.name: Run prosecute or liquidate
nodes.summary: Execute prosecute or liquidate sub-verb effects.

nodes.name: Create observable record
nodes.summary: Create observable-action record with heat-modulated visibility for player counter-intel.

nodes.name: Apply player-action shift
nodes.summary: Apply FactionBalance shift triggered by player actions.

nodes.name: Apply repression-failure shift
nodes.summary: Apply shift triggered by failed repression actions.

nodes.name: Apply material-condition shift
nodes.summary: Apply shift triggered by changes in material conditions (Phi, profit rate, etc.).

nodes.name: Renormalize FactionBalance
nodes.summary: Renormalize so faction weights sum to 1.0.

nodes.name: Check fascist override
nodes.summary: Check if settler-populist faction crossed override threshold; if so, lock in fascist convergence.

nodes.name: Read edge state
nodes.summary: Read each contradiction edge's current state (intensity, divergence).

nodes.name: Compute intensity
nodes.summary: Compute new intensity = sigmoid(divergence * dual_centrality), clamped [0, 1].

nodes.name: Emit CONTRADICTION_INTENSIFIED event
nodes.summary: Publish CONTRADICTION_INTENSIFIED, RUPTURE, or qualitative-leap event.

nodes.name: Compute field derivatives
nodes.summary: Compute per-node temporal and spatial derivatives over registered fields.

nodes.name: Rank by gradient magnitude
nodes.summary: Rank candidate contradictions by gradient magnitude.

nodes.name: Flag principal contradiction
nodes.summary: Mark the maximum-magnitude contradiction as principal for downstream predicates.

nodes.name: Evaluate compound predicate
nodes.summary: Evaluate compound predicate condition over field values and derivatives for each edge.

nodes.name: Transition state
nodes.summary: Move edge between EdgeMode states (e.g. exploitation -> co-optive -> rupture).

nodes.name: Emit aspect flip event
nodes.summary: Publish edge-aspect flip event for observers (notable for narrative AI).

nodes.name: Advance cohort promotion
nodes.summary: Apply per-cohort promotion probabilities (D->P or P->upper class).

nodes.name: Advance cohort demotion
nodes.summary: Apply per-cohort demotion probabilities (D'->D or downward class flow).

nodes.name: Apply reproduction flows
nodes.summary: Apply intergenerational reproduction flows (D->P->D' arc) to update cohort sizes.

nodes.name: Aggregate territory state
nodes.summary: Aggregate per-territory metrics (services delivered, repression heat, etc.).

nodes.name: Compute index in [0, 1]
nodes.summary: Compute the legitimation index in [0, 1].

nodes.name: Classify legitimation crisis
nodes.summary: Classify into stable / strained / crisis / interregnum levels.

nodes.name: Read mobility params
nodes.summary: Read ClassMobilityParams (per-class transition probabilities) from defines.

nodes.name: Compute promotion probabilities
nodes.summary: Compute per-class promotion/demotion probabilities for the cohort.

nodes.name: Apply class transitions
nodes.summary: Apply transitions to update population counts in each class.

nodes.name: Compute mortality rate
nodes.summary: Compute base mortality rate from subsistence shortfall.

nodes.name: Scale by inequality
nodes.summary: Scale mortality by Gini coefficient; clamp to [0, 1].

nodes.name: Emit DEATHS event
nodes.summary: Publish DEATHS event with cohort breakdown for metrics and persistence.

nodes.name: Subscribe to tick events
nodes.summary: Register NarrativeDirector as a SimulationObserver to receive tick events.

nodes.name: Translate event to RAG query
nodes.summary: Map each EventType to a corresponding RAG query template.

nodes.name: Render Persephone prompt
nodes.summary: Render the Persephone Persona system prompt for the LLM.

nodes.name: Invoke LLM
nodes.summary: Invoke the LLMProvider (DeepSeek or MockLLM) with the assembled prompt.

nodes.name: Judge narrative output
nodes.summary: NarrativeCommissar scores narrative on ominousness/certainty/drama/metaphor-family.

nodes.name: Embed query
nodes.summary: Embed the query text via the embedding provider (Ollama).

nodes.name: Search ChromaDB vectors
nodes.summary: Vector-similarity search against the ChromaDB collection.

nodes.name: Assemble context window
nodes.summary: Bound prompt context from retrieved chunks via ContextWindowManager.

nodes.name: Enforce token budget
nodes.summary: Honor token budgets and reserve allocations.

nodes.name: Return QueryResponse
nodes.summary: Return QueryResponse to NarrativeDirector.

nodes.name: Capture tick snapshot
nodes.summary: CausalChainObserver captures TickSnapshot into sliding-window history.

nodes.name: Scan for wage crash then repression
nodes.summary: Scan window for wage-crash-followed-by-repression-spike pattern.

nodes.name: Emit causal frame
nodes.summary: Emit structured causal frame for downstream narrative generation.

nodes.name: Generate R8 mesh
nodes.summary: Generate the R8 H3 mesh at resolution 8 covering the simulation extent.

nodes.name: Classify terrain
nodes.summary: Classify terrain types (water, resource zones) per R8 hex via Natural Earth polygon intersection.

nodes.name: Aggregate utility coverage
nodes.summary: Aggregate FCC broadband and other utility coverage per R8 hex.

nodes.name: Assign biocapacity stock
nodes.summary: Assign initial biocapacity stock per R8 hex based on terrain and resource layers.

nodes.name: Emit R8 substrate state
nodes.summary: Emit the validated R8 substrate state for use by territory-aware systems.

nodes.name: Load Natural Earth shapefiles
nodes.summary: Load lakes, roads, railroads, airports, ports shapefiles via NaturalEarthReader.

nodes.name: Intersect with hexes
nodes.summary: Intersect linear features with R8 hex polygons via shapely.

nodes.name: Create Link/Junction states
nodes.summary: Create InfrastructureLinkState and JunctionState entities at intersections and vertices.

nodes.name: Scan airport/port pairs
nodes.summary: Enumerate candidate airport-airport and port-port pairs across the mesh.

nodes.name: Compute capacity weights
nodes.summary: Compute capacity weights per nonlocal edge using DefaultEdgeCapacity.

nodes.name: Add nonlocal edges to graph
nodes.summary: Add the nonlocal edges to the topology graph for cross-territory throughput.

edges.description: Tick pipeline invokes ImperialRentSystem first in the canonical 23-system order
Wage and wealth deltas from extraction route into agitation pressure that feeds consciousness drift bifurcation
Solidarity multipliers from neighborhood aggregation amplify P(S|R) revolution probability
Rupture conditions (P(S|R) > P(S|A)) trigger UPRISING events in the agency layer
Uprising and revolutionary-offensive events bump territory heat scores
Heat scores consumed by State AI escalation-ladder scoring to bias repression decisions
State AI repression actions (raid, prosecute, liquidate) and territory verbs (displace, scorched-earth) feed heat dynamics
State AI co-opt verbs (propagandize, divide) shape consciousness via narrative routing and edge degradation
Imperial dialectic in Volume III consumes Phi flows; ValueTensor4x3 feeds production dialectic
Crisis dialectics (realization, disproportionality, debt spiral, financial) emit events into TRPF domain
Crisis events feed ceiling effects and legitimation amplifier in bifurcation analysis
Extraction signals from imperial rent drive per-territory biocapacity depletion
Ecological collapse outcome detected by EndgameDetector observer in bifurcation domain
Solidarity subgraph topology (giant component, Betti numbers) drives percolation phase-transition detection
RUPTURE events from contradiction field trigger struggle-system follow-on logic
Field derivatives identify principal contradiction that feeds bifurcation axis tendency analysis
Legitimation index per territory feeds the legitimation amplifier in bifurcation analysis (Gramscian interregnum)
DISPOSSESSION events from heat-driven evictions trigger cohort downgrade cascades in lifecycle dynamics
H3 hex grid provides Territory entities and adjacency for heat spillover propagation
Per-hex biocapacity stocks read by metabolic-rift calculator for ecological accounting
EventBus publishes tick events that NarrativeDirector observer consumes (one-way: narrative reads, never writes)
BifurcationMonitor and TopologyMonitor are SimulationObservers attached to the tick pipeline
